fieldId.description: Backend field-thread identifier. Replies inherit the parent field scope.

parentId.description: Parent comment id for one-level threaded replies.

mentions.description: Mentioned user identifiers parsed from comment content.

mentionedCount.description: Unresolved comments in this record that mention the current requester.

mentionedFieldCounts.description: Per-field unresolved mention counts for the current requester.

mentionedCount.description: Number of unresolved comments in this record that mention the current user.

unreadCount.description: Number of unresolved mentioned comments in this record that have not been marked as read by the current user.

mentionedFieldIds.description: Deduplicated, sorted field ids where the user is mentioned.

unresolvedMentionCount.description: Total number of unresolved comments mentioning the current user across all records.

unreadMentionCount.description: Total unresolved mentioned comments that have not been marked as read by the current user.

mentionedRecordCount.description: Number of distinct records with unresolved mentions.

unreadRecordCount.description: Number of distinct records with unread mentions.

items.description: Per-record breakdown, sorted by mentionedCount desc, rowId asc.

approvalMode.description:
Approval aggregation mode for a single approval node. `single`
preserves the Wave 1 behavior, `all` represents countersign, and
`any` represents any-sign.

emptyAssigneePolicy.description:
Behavior when the approval node resolves to zero assignees. `error`
blocks runtime execution, `auto-approve` allows the node to advance
automatically.

ApprovalParallelNodeConfig.description:
Parallel gateway (并行分支) — fans into the listed branch edges and
re-joins at `joinNodeKey`. v1 only ships `joinMode: all` (会签 on
the join); `any` is reserved for a future wave.

branches.description:
Outgoing edgeKeys, one per branch. Each edge's downstream path
must reach `joinNodeKey` before any `end` or loop, and must not
share approver assignees with any other branch.

joinMode.description:
Join policy at `joinNodeKey`. `all` waits for every branch to
report complete before advancing. `any` (future) would advance
on the first branch to complete.

joinNodeKey.description:
The approval / cc node every branch converges onto. Required —
lets the runtime short-circuit walker without structural
inference.

fieldId.description: Field id that controls the dependent field's visibility.

value.description: Single comparison value for eq/neq operators.

values.description: Candidate values for the in operator.

metadata.description:
Runtime-populated metadata. Optional keys written by the approval executor:
  - `aggregateCancelledBy` (string): userId of the approver whose any-mode (或签)
    first-wins decision deactivated this sibling assignment.
  - `aggregateCancelledAt` (string, ISO-8601): timestamp when the cancellation fired.
  - `aggregateMode` ('any'): aggregation mode that triggered the cancellation;
    present alongside `aggregateCancelledBy` on cancelled sibling assignments.

currentNodeKeys.description:
Parallel gateway (并行分支) runtime frontier. Present only when
the instance is inside a parallel region with ≥ 2 still-pending
branches. Each entry is the current approval node key for one
branch. When absent or length < 2, use `currentNodeKey`
unchanged for the linear / non-parallel flow.

ids.description: Department, role, or user ids for scoped visibility.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token

error.message: You do not have permission to perform this action
Field 'page' must be a positive integer
Request body must be valid JSON

NotFound.description: Not found - Resource does not exist

error.message: The requested resource was not found
User with ID 'user123' does not exist
Role with ID 'role456' does not exist
Spreadsheet with ID 'sheet789' does not exist
File with ID 'file123' does not exist

Conflict.description: Conflict - Request conflicts with current resource state

error.message: Service temporarily overloaded, please try again later

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of approval instances. The live route accepts
both page/pageSize and the older limit/offset pagination fallback.
Use `tab` for the current inbox lens, plus optional sourceSystem,
workflowKey, businessKey, assignee, status, and search filters.

post.summary: Create approval request from a published template
post.description:
Initiates a new approval instance from a published template. The formData
is validated against the template's formSchema (required fields, type
checks, enum legality). Returns 400 if the template is not published or
form validation fails. On success, generates request number (AP-XXXXXX).

get.summary: Get pending approvals for current actor

post.description:
Pulls approval instances from the PLM bridge into the unified approval
inbox. Requires approvals:read and a configured PLM adapter.

get.description:
Returns the full approval instance including formSnapshot, assignments,
and current status. PLM-backed approvals (id starting with 'plm:') are
resolved via the PLM adapter.

post.description:
Unified action dispatch endpoint. Accepted actions: approve, reject,
transfer (requires targetUserId), revoke (subject to RuntimePolicy),
comment (does not change status), and return (requires targetNodeKey).
Concurrent writes are serialized with a database row lock. This endpoint
does not accept a client version field. 409 responses indicate a
conflicting current state after serialization, such as an invalid status
transition or a closed revoke window. The Wave 2 Pack 1A executor
follow-up will activate return semantics for template-runtime approvals.

get.description:
Returns the paginated action history for an approval instance, including
create, approve, reject, transfer, revoke, and comment events with
actor details and timestamps.

Returns the current actor's active pending assignment count and the
unread subset used by the approval center badge.

post.description:
Records a read marker for the current actor. For unsynced external
approvals the route returns `{ ok: true, skipped: true }`.

post.summary: Mark all pending approvals as read
post.description:
Marks every active pending assignment for the current actor as read.
`sourceSystem` scopes the operation to the current inbox filter.

Records a remind event for a pending approval. The requester or an
approver may call it. The route is rate-limited to once per instance
per actor per hour and returns 429 with the last remind timestamp when
throttled.

get.description:
Returns admin-only approval observability data: the existing metrics
summary plus TopN slowest completed instances and templates with the
highest SLA breach rate.

Returns a paginated list of approval templates. Supports search by name
and filtering by status/category. Non-template-managers only receive
templates visible to their actor scope (`all`, matching department,
role, or user). Template managers can see all templates.

post.description:
Creates a new approval template in draft status. Requires key (unique),
name, formSchema (with fields), and approvalGraph (nodes + edges).
The template must be published before it can be used to initiate approvals.
Optional category and visibilityScope metadata live on the parent
template row and do not become version snapshots.

get.description: Returns distinct non-null categories visible to the current actor.

Returns the full template including formSchema and approvalGraph when
the current actor can see the template. Template managers can see all
templates.

patch.description:
Updates an existing template. formSchema/approvalGraph updates create a
new version; metadata-only updates such as category or visibilityScope
update the parent row in place. All fields are optional.

post.description:
Clones an existing template's latest formSchema/approvalGraph into a
new draft template. Category and visibilityScope are copied; published
definitions and version history are not copied.

Publishes the latest draft version of a template. Requires a RuntimePolicy
(allowRevoke, optional revokeBeforeNodeKeys). Generates a
publishedDefinition and runtimeGraph. After publishing, the template can
be used to initiate new approval instances.

get.description:
Returns a specific version of a template. Published versions include the
runtimeGraph with policy; draft versions have runtimeGraph set to null.

occurredAt.description: Preferred punch timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Optional target user. Cross-user access requires attendance admin/approver privileges.

requestedOutAt.description: Required for missed_check_out. Optional for time_correction, leave, and overtime.

overtimeRuleId.description: Required for overtime requests unless overtimeRuleName is provided.

minutes.description: Required for overtime unless derived from requestedInAt/requestedOutAt.

features.description: Product capability flags for UI shells.

get.description: Returns row-scoped comments, including optional field-thread comments and reply comments.

post.description: Creates a record comment, field comment, or one-level reply within an existing comment thread.

fieldId.description: Optional field-scoped thread anchor. Replies inherit the parent thread field scope.

parentId.description: Optional parent comment id. Reply-to-reply is rejected.

mentions.description: Optional explicit mention user ids. When omitted, the backend falls back to parsing mention tokens from content.

get.description: Returns comments from other collaborators that either mention the current authenticated user or remain unread, including unread state, mention state, and navigation context.
Returns active user suggestions for multitable comment authoring. The frontend may locally filter the returned candidates while the backend supports optional query narrowing.
Returns the count of unread comments from other collaborators that currently appear in the comment inbox.

Returns a sheet-scoped summary of unresolved comments that mention the current authenticated user. Only unresolved comments are counted. Items are sorted by descending mentionedCount, then ascending rowId.

post.description: Marks all currently unresolved mention items for the current user in the given spreadsheet as read.

get.description: Returns unresolved comment counts per record, including per-field unresolved thread counts and current-user mention counts for badge rendering.

parameters.name: rowIds
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated row ids to scope the summary response.

patch.description: Updates the content and explicit mentions of an existing unresolved comment authored by the current user.

delete.description: Hard-deletes an authored comment when it has no reply comments.
